case_title: ELIZABETH L. JOHNSON ET AL VS. RAGHNI KHANNA ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-30-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KHANNA, RAGHNI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00) SERVED DEC-04-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NAIDU, KAUSHICK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH L. JOHNSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JOHN SPELLMAN IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE COURTCALL. DEFENDANT RAGHNI KHANNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAUSHICK NAIDU IS PRESENT. SUB-SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IS UNTIMELY BY 5 DAYS. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ELIZABETH L. SPELLMAN, JOHN W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHANNA, RAGHNI NAIDU, KAUSHICK $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $430.00, DEFENDANTS RAGHNI KHANNA AND KAUSHICK NAIDU JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS ELIZABETH JOHNSON AND JOHN SPELLMAN. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVE DEEP CLEANING WAS NECESSARY TO RESTORE APARTMENT TO CONDITIONS IT WAS IN WHEN PLAINTIFFS MOVED IN. STOVE NEEDED TO BE REPAIRED BECAUSE OF DAMAGE CAUSED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ELIZABETH L. AS TO DEFENDANT NAIDU, KAUSHICK
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (WITH SUPPORTING DECLARATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPELLMAN, JOHN W.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAIDU, KAUSHICK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $663.85 FILED BY JOHNSON, ELIZABETH L. SPELLMAN, JOHN W. AS TO DEFENDANT KHANNA, RAGHNI NAIDU, KAUSHICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ELIZABETH L. AS TO DEFENDANT KHANNA, RAGHNI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.
